speaker: ONE-EYED BART
text: Money, money, money! Ha! Ha! Ha! Bart stashes the loot. Suddenly, a lasso yanks his arm off.

speaker: ONE-EYED BART
text: Hey! The lasso lifts him off his feet. He falls, dazed. A

speaker: WOODY
text: You got a date with justice, One-Eyed Bart!

speaker: VOICE
text: Ai! Ai-ai-ai-ai-ai-yah! A Ninja warrior, ONE-EYED BETTY , flips down the train roof, wielding a sword and nun-chucks.

speaker: WOODY
text: One-Eyed Betty! Woody handsprings away. He gets to the end of the Caboose. Betty hits him with her purse. He teeters, then falls.

speaker: WOODY
text: Whoa, whoa... Ahhh...! Bart and Betty laugh, peek over the edge...

speaker: GALLOPING HOOVES
text: TILT UP to find Woody, riding BULLSEYE, JESSIE at the reins.

speaker: JESSIE
text: I believe you dropped something, Mister!

speaker: ONE-EYED BART
text: Jessie?!

speaker: WOODY
text: You’ve reached the end of the line, Bart. Bart pulls out a remote detonator.

speaker: ONE-EYED BART
text: I always wanted to go out with a bang! Ahead, a huge trestle bridge spans a canyon. ZOOM to

speaker: JESSIE
text: Oh no!

speaker: WOODY
text: The orphans!

speaker: ONE-EYED BART
text: Hate to leave early, but our ride is here. HONK-HONK! A pink Corvette, driven by the three ALIENS, pulls up alongside the train.

speaker: ALIENS
text: Oooooooooo!

speaker: ONE-EYED BART
text: It’s me or the kiddies, Sheriff! Take your pick! The Potato Heads leap off the train into the Corvette. They speed off. Woody looks at the out-of-control train.

speaker: WOODY
text: Ride like the wind, Bullseye! Bullseye runs up next to the speeding locomotive.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hold him steady... Woody stands, then leaps from Bullseye into the locomotive.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Woody, hurry! Woody turns a gear, pulls the brake. Train wheels lock. Sparks fly. Woody looks ahead.

speaker: JESSIE
text: No...! From deep in the canyon, a FLASH and RUMBLE. Then, the entire train rises into the sky. Holding it from below is BUZZ LIGHTYEAR.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Glad I could catch the train! Woody leans out the front.

speaker: WOODY
text: Now let’s catch some criminals!

speaker: BUZZ
text: To Infinity... And Beyond!

speaker: ALIENS
text: OooOOOOoooo! Buzz flies out of the sun, firing his laser. The Corvette is sliced in half. The halves fall away. The Outlaws tumble into a heap. Woody and Jessie step up. Buzz lands nearby, laser poised.

speaker: WOODY
text: Reach for the sky!

speaker: ONE-EYED BART
text: You can’t touch me, Sheriff! I brought my attack dog with a built-in force field! Bart WHISTLES. From above, SLINKY springs down the canyon walls, coils crackling with energy. He circles the gang, bites his tail. An ENERGY BUBBLE forms around them.

speaker: WOODY
text: Well, I brought my dinosaur, who eats force-field dogs!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Yo-Dee-Le-Hi-HoooOOOOOOOO! The Earth trembles. Cracks form. The ground bursts open. A giant REX emerges, BELLOWING. He leans toward Bart, lets out a fearsome ROAR. A shadow. Rex stops. An intense HUM. Everyone looks up. An enormous, pig-shaped spaceship hovers above them.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Evil Dr. Porkchop!!! We FLY UP to...

speaker: EVIL DR. PORKCHOP
text: That’s Mr. Evil Dr. Porkchop to you! Bart, Betty, Slinky, and the Aliens are suddenly beamed up.

speaker: YOUNG ANDY
text: Buzz! Shoot your laser at my badge!

speaker: YOUNG ANDY
text: Woody, no! It’ll kill you!

speaker: YOUNG ANDY
text: Just do it!

speaker: YOUNG ANDY
text: You’re going to jail, Bart. Camera ZOOMS IN. Andy looks up, stops.

speaker: MOM
text: No, no...! Keep playing! Just pretend I’m not here. Suddenly, MOLLY, 2, toddles in, knocking over Tinker Toys.

speaker: MOM
text: Oh, no! Molly...!

speaker: YOUNG ANDY
text: No, it’s okay, Mom! It’s... A 50- foot baby from outer space! She’s on a rampage! Run for your lives! Andy races around. Chaos, laughing. Buster enters, BARKING. The CAMERA PIVOTS UPSIDE-DOWN, revealing Mom’s face.

speaker: MOM
text: Does the red light mean it’s going? The TAPE GLITCHES and we JUMP TO...

speaker: MOM
text: Come on, say ‘Happy Birthday’ to Molly...

speaker: YOUNG ANDY
text: Happhy Brffday!

speaker: MOM
text: Oh, charming. Andy holds Woody up to CAMERA, cake crumbs flying.

speaker: YOUNG ANDY
text: Happhy Brffday!!!

speaker: MOM
text: Look how tall you’re getting! Andy steps away and beams.

speaker: BUZZ
text: “Buzz Lightyear to the rescue!”

speaker: ANDY
text: Good work Buzz! Andy makes Buzz and Woody high five.

speaker: HAMM
text: Someone’s foot is in my face...

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: It’s mine! Give it back!

speaker: ALIENS
text: You saved our lives! We are eternally grateful! Potato Head groans. Buzz sits by the rim. Jessie climbs up.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Buzz, mind if I squeeze in next to ya?!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Yes! No! I mean...! Why would I mind?! Squeezing next to... You! He laughs, nervous. She grins. Finally, he turns away.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Is it hot in here?

speaker: REX
text: Here they come! The Toys clamber to the rim and gaze out.

speaker: WOODY
text: Sarge! You got it...?!

speaker: SARGE
text: Mission accomplished! The Toys are thrilled. The Army Men hoist the sock up.

speaker: WOODY
text: Careful...! Careful!!! Buzz turns the sock upside-down. A cell phone slides out. Toys gather around.

speaker: WOODY
text: All right, guys. We got one shot at this. Everyone ready?

speaker: JESSIE
text: We’re ready, Woody! Let’s do it!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Target is on approach. Woody’s eyes are fixed on the door.

speaker: WOODY
text: Just like we rehearsed it, guys... The door opens. ANDY enters but we only SEE his jean-clad legs. He scans the room, zeroes in on the toy chest. He lifts the lid REVEALING... Andy is a teenager. His hair is long and his voice deep, but he has the same kind face. He looks down, puzzled. The Toys lie, lifeless, amid sports equipment and clothing. The phone RINGS again. Andy’s hand rummages. Woody hugs the cordless as Andy’s fingers pass by and find the cell phone. He pulls it out. The phone is stuck in Rex’s arms. Andy pulls. Rex clings. Andy finally yanks the phone loose.

speaker: ANDY
text: Hello...?

speaker: ANDY
text: Molly, stay outta my room!

speaker: MOLLY
text: I wasn’t in your room! Andy scoffs, looks down at Rex in his hand. Rex lies

speaker: ANDY
text: Then who was messing with my stuff?

speaker: MOLLY
text: It wasn’t me...!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Well, that went well! They spill out onto the floor. The room has changed -- rock posters, guitar, skateboard, other teen detritus.

speaker: REX
text: He held me! He actually held me!

speaker: HAMM
text: Oh, this is just sad.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Who are we kiddin’? The kid’s seventeen years old! Woody and Buzz jump down, exchange a glance. Buzz nods. Woody waves his arms.

speaker: WOODY
text: Guys, hey, hold up! We need a staff meeting! Everyone? A staff meeting! GROANS of boredom.

speaker: HAMM
text: Not again...!

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, come on! Slink? Gather everyone up!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Uh... We are gathered, Woody! The Toy Community is a lot smaller. Woody rolls with it.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: More like a misfire!

speaker: WOODY
text: ...But we’ve always said this job isn’t about getting played with. It’s about...

speaker: JESSIE
text: ...Being there for Andy. We know.

speaker: REX
text: But we can try again, right? Woody looks at all of them. He shakes his head.

speaker: WOODY
text: I’m callin’ it, guys. We’re closin’ up shop. Gasps. Everyone is crushed by this news.

speaker: WOODY
text: Andy’s going to college any day now... That was our last shot. Mrs. Potato Head begins to sniffle. Buzz steps forward.

speaker: BUZZ
text: We’re going into Attic Mode, folks. Keep your accessories with you at all

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: “Orderly?” Don’t you get it?! We’re done! Finished! Over the hill!

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey, hey, now come on, guys! We all knew this day was coming! Buzz, in FOREGROUND, sees something off-screen, frowns.

speaker: HAMM
text: Yeah, but now its here!

speaker: WOODY
text: Look, every toy goes through this! No one wants to see their kid leave!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Hey! Sarge! What are you doing?! Everyone turns. Sarge and his last two Soldiers climb to the window sill.

speaker: SARGE
text: War’s over, folks. Me ‘n the boys are movin’ on.

speaker: WOODY
text: Moving on...?!

speaker: BUZZ
text: You’re going AWOL?!

speaker: SARGE
text: We done our duty. Andy’s grown up.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Trash bags...?!

speaker: WOODY
text: Who said anything about trash bags?

speaker: SARGE
text: It has been an honor serving with you. Good luck, folks. Sarge straps in tandem with Soldier One. They leap. Their parachute opens and the wind carries them off.

speaker: SOLDIER TWO
text: You’re gonna need it...! He jumps and flies off too. The Toys are stunned.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no... Wait...! Wait! Wait!!!

speaker: REX
text: We’re getting thrown away?!

speaker: WOODY
text: No! No one’s getting thrown away!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: How do you know?! Jessie begins to panic.

speaker: JESSIE
text: We’re being abandoned...!

speaker: BUZZ
text: We’ll be fine, Jessie!

speaker: HAMM
text: So why did Sarge leave?!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Should we leave?!

speaker: SLINKY
text: I thought we were goin’ to the attic!

speaker: REX
text: Oh, I hate all this uncertainty...! Woody turns, waves his arms.

speaker: WOODY
text: Whoa, whoa! Hold on! Quiet!!! No one’s getting thrown out, okay?! We’re all still here, aren’t we?! I mean, yeah, we’ve lost friends

speaker: REX
text: Bo Peep...? Woody nods, stoic.

speaker: WOODY
text: Even... Even Bo. All good toys who’ve gone on to new owners. But through every yard sale, every spring cleaning, Andy held on to us. He must care about us or we wouldn’t be here.

speaker: BUZZ
text: ...And we’ll all be together.

speaker: WOODY
text: Exactly. There’s games up there, and books... And, and...

speaker: BUZZ
text: The race-car track...

speaker: WOODY
text: The race-car track. Thank you!

speaker: SLINKY
text: And the old TV...!

speaker: REX
text: And he’ll play with us then, right? Woody looks at Rex, unable to say “yes”.

speaker: WOODY
text: We’ll always be there for him.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Come on, guys! Let’s get our parts together, get ready, and go out on a high note. The Toys disperse.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: I’d better find my other eye...

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Where’d ya leave it this time? She puts a hand over her empty eye socket.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Someplace dark. And dusty! Hamm turns to Rex.

speaker: HAMM
text: C’mon. Let’s see how much we’re goin’ for on eBay... Woody watches as the Toys trudge off.

speaker: WOODY
text: Don’t worry. Andy’s gonna take care of us. I guarantee it.

speaker: BUZZ
text: You guarantee it, huh...?

speaker: WOODY
text: I dunno, Buzz. What else could I say?

speaker: BUZZ
text: Whatever happens, at least we’ll be together.

speaker: WOODY
text: For Infinity and Beyond... FOOTSTEPS on the stairs. Woody and Buzz turn.

speaker: MOLLY
text: Can I have your stereo?

speaker: ANDY
text: No!

speaker: MOLLY
text: Why not?

speaker: ANDY
text: ‘Cause I’m taking it with me! The Toys scramble back into the toy chest. Andy enters with Molly close behind.

speaker: MOLLY
text: Can I have your computer?

speaker: ANDY
text: No!

speaker: MOLLY
text: Your video games?

speaker: ANDY
text: Forget it, Molly! Molly sighs, walks off. Andy starts typing on his laptop. Andy’s Mom enters carrying cardboard boxes and trash bags.

speaker: MOM
text: Okay, Andy, let’s get to work here. Anything you’re not taking to college either goes in the attic, or it’s trash. She picks up a box and writes “College” in magic marker. Andy stares at his computer.

speaker: ANDY
text: Mom, I’m not leaving ‘til Friday!

speaker: ANDY
text: Mom...! She picks up his skateboard, puts it in the “College” box.

speaker: MOM
text: Look, it’s simple: Skateboard? College. Little league trophy? Probably attic. Apple core? Trash. You can do the rest. She tosses an apple core in a trash bag, hands it to Andy. Molly opens the Toy Chest.

speaker: MOLLY
text: Why do you still have these Toys?

speaker: ANDY
text: Molly, out of my room...!

speaker: MOLLY
text: Three more days and it’s mine...! She strides out the door.

speaker: MOM
text: Molly, you’re not off the hook either!

speaker: THE TOY CHEST
text: The Toys watch as Mom picks up a box, enters Molly’s room.

speaker: MOM
text: You have more toys than you know what to do with. Some of ‘em could make other kids really happy...

speaker: MOLLY
text: What kids...?

speaker: MOM
text: The children at the day care. They’re always asking for donations. Rex whispers.

speaker: REX
text: What’s “day care”?

speaker: WOODY
text: Shhh...!!! Mom writes SUNNYSIDE on the box. Molly pouts.

speaker: MOLLY
text: But, Mom...

speaker: MOM
text: No “buts”. You choose the toys you wanna donate. I’ll drop ‘em off at Sunnyside.

speaker: THE TOY CHEST
text: Across the hall, the Toys react.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Poor Barbie...!

speaker: HAMM
text: I get the Corvette.

speaker: ANDY
text: Like what? She pulls open the toy chest.

speaker: MOM
text: Like, what are you gonna do with these toys? Should we donate ‘em to Sunnyside?

speaker: MOM
text: Maybe sell them online...?

speaker: MOM
text: Fine. You have ‘til Friday -- anything that’s not packed for college, or in the attic, is getting thrown out.

speaker: ANDY
text: “Whatever you say, Mom.” He stares at his laptop. She shakes her head, exits. Andy sighs, closes his laptop. He turns, surveys his room. He rolls his chair to the toy chest and opens the lid.

speaker: IN THE BAG
text: Buzz is stunned and hurt. Andy cinches the bag closed and carries it from the room. Behind him, Woody pops up from the College box, shocked.

speaker: IN THE BAG
text: It’s dim and crowded.

speaker: REX
text: What’s happening...?!!!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: We’re getting thrown out, you idiot! That’s what’s happening!!! Woody jumps from the box, runs across the room, hides behind the door frame. Andy walks onto the hall landing, reaches up, and pulls open a trapdoor ladder that leads to the attic. Woody watches, relieved. Andy begins climbing to the attic. One rung... Two... Molly enters the hall landing, struggling with her box. It hits the door frame. A Magic 8-Ball falls out.

speaker: ANDY
text: You need a hand?

speaker: MOLLY
text: I got it... Andy steps down, leaves the bag at the foot of the ladder, grabs the 8-Ball. He helps Molly carry her box downstairs.

speaker: ANDY
text: Here. So, you gonna miss me when I’m gone?

speaker: MOLLY
text: If I say ‘no’, do I still get your room?

speaker: ANDY
text: Nope.

speaker: MOLLY
text: Then, yes, I’ll miss you. They disappear.

speaker: JESSIE
text: I can’t breathe!

speaker: REX
text: This can’t be happening!!!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Quiet...!!!! What’s that sound? They all listen. A faint CREAKING.

speaker: IN THE BAG
text: The bag is tipped over. The Toys tumble over each other.

speaker: TOYS
text: Whooaaaaa...!!!

speaker: MOM
text: Andy...?! No answer. Mom sighs, picks up the toy-filled bag and exits, carrying it downstairs. ANDY’S ROOM

speaker: WOODY
text: That’s not trash! That’s not trash!! He steps back, mind reeling.

speaker: WOODY
text: Think, Woody...! Think! Think! Oooh! Buster! C’mere, boy! C’mere! Off-screen PAWS and the JINGLE of a dog collar. Buster

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, boy! To the curb! Hyah!!! Buster yawns and flops over, pinning Woody under him.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, Buster, no...! Woody grabs Buster by the jowls, pulls him backwards. Finally, Buster rolls over. Woody sits up, gasping. Off-screen, a door SLAMS. Woody turns. Woody rushes to the window, gazes out.

speaker: IN THE BAG
text: Mounting panic.

speaker: JESSIE
text: We’re on the curb!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Oh, I knew it would come to this! Buzz grabs the side of the bag, tries to tear it open.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Pull, everyone! Pull!!!

speaker: IN THE BAG
text: The Toys follow Buzz’s lead, pulling the sides of the bag.

speaker: REX
text: It won’t rip!

speaker: HAMM
text: Ah, forget it! It’s triple-ply highdensity polyethylene!

speaker: BUZZ
text: There’s gotta be a way out!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Andy doesn’t want us! What’s the point?

speaker: BUZZ
text: Point... Point... POINT!!! Buzz looks at Rex’s pointy tail.

speaker: OUTSIDE THE BAG
text: The truck RUMBLES closer, two driveways away.

speaker: IN THE BAG
text: The Toys follow Buzz, shoving Rex backwards.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Push! Push!!!

speaker: REX
text: I can hear the garbage truck!

speaker: OUTSIDE THE BAG
text: The bag stretches. Rex’s tail is nearly through.

speaker: REX
text: It’s getting closer-fffmmm! Rex is muffled by a mouthful of plastic.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz...!!! Jessie...!!! A TINKLE. Woody turns. In Andy’s driveway, an upside-down recycling bin scurries on little feet into the garage. Woody sighs, relieved.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Andy threw us out...!

speaker: HAMM
text: Like we were garbage...!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: “Junk”! He called us “junk”!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: How could he...?! She SOBS on Mr. Potato Head’s shoulder.

speaker: BUZZ
text: This doesn’t make any sense...! Jessie is furious.

speaker: JESSIE
text: I should’a seen this coming! It’s Emily all over again!

speaker: HAMM
text: Sarge was right...!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Yeah! And Woody was wrong!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Wait a minute! Hold on! This is no time to be hysterical.

speaker: HAMM
text: It’s the perfect time to be hysterical!

speaker: REX
text: Should we be hysterical...?!!!

speaker: SLINKY
text: No!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Yes!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Maybe! But not right now!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Yeeeeeeeeeeeeeee--hawwwwwwwwww...!!! Everyone turns. Jessie is smiling.

speaker: WOODY
text: What the heck...?!

speaker: JESSIE
text: We should’a done this years ago!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Jessie, wait...! What about Woody?!

speaker: JESSIE
text: He’s fine, Buzz! Andy’s takin’ him to college! Now we need to go! Buzz looks at her and the others.

speaker: BUZZ
text: You’re right. Come on! He helps pass the Aliens up. Woody approaches, incredulous.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz...?

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody...!

speaker: WOODY
text: What’s going on? Don’t you know this box is being donated!

speaker: BUZZ
text: It’s under control! We have a plan!

speaker: REX
text: We’re going to Day Care!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Didn’t you see? Andy threw us away!

speaker: WOODY
text: No...! No, no, no! He was putting you in the attic!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Attic? So how’d we end up on the curb?!

speaker: WOODY
text: That was a mistake! Andy’s Mom thought you were trash!

speaker: HAMM
text: Yeah! After he put us in a trash bag!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: And called us “junk”!

speaker: WOODY
text: I know it looks bad but, guys, ya gotta believe me!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Sure thing, “College Boy”!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Andy’s movin’ on, Woody! It’s time we did the same. Jessie and the others duck in the box, pull the flaps shut.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, out of the box! Everyone, right

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, great! Great!!! It’s gonna take us forever to get back here! The car lurches into gear and drives off.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: It’s all right, Barbie. You’ll be okay! Barbie nods, putting on a brave front.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Well... Molly and I have been growing apart for years, it’s just... I can’t believe she would throw me away! She breaks down again. Potato Head rolls his eyes.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Welcome to the club, Toots! Suddenly, the box flaps open and Woody and Buzz vault in.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, everyone, listen up... We can get back to Andy’s but we gotta move fast. We’ll hide under the seats ‘til we get home... The Toys react, incensed.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Get it through your vinyl noggin,

speaker: WOODY
text: He was putting you... In the attic!!! Jessie goes toe-to-toe with Woody.

speaker: JESSIE
text: He left us... On the curb! Buzz intervenes.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Alright, calm down! Both of you!

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, fine! Just wait’ll you see what Day Care’s like!

speaker: REX
text: Why...?! What’s it like?!

speaker: WOODY
text: Day Care is a sad, lonely place for washed-up old toys who have no owners. Abruptly, Barbie bursts into tears.

speaker: HAMM
text: Quite the charmer, aren’t ya?

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, you’ll see! As soon as we get to Day Care, you’ll be begging to go home. The car hits a bump and Woody tumbles.

speaker: REX
text: Can anyone see anything?

speaker: JESSIE
text: There’s a playground...! Through fencing we SEE glimpses of kids running and playing with SHOUTS and LAUGHTER. The Toys look at each other.

speaker: JESSIE
text: We hit the jackpot, Bullseye!

speaker: HAMM
text: So much for “sad and lonely”, eh?

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, calm down, guys. Let’s keep this in perspective...

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Perspective?! This place is perfect!

speaker: REX
text: Woody, it’s nice! See, the door has a rainbow on it!

speaker: MOM
text: Hey, there!

speaker: RECEPTIONIST
text: Wow! Haven’t seen you in ages...

speaker: MOM
text: Just wanted to drop these old toys off. She puts the box on the counter.

speaker: MOM
text: Is this Bonnie?! Look how big you are! The girl, BONNIE, looks up, then turns to her Mother, shy.

speaker: RECEPTIONIST
text: Say hi, sweetie!

speaker: BONNIE
text: Hi.

speaker: RECEPTIONIST
text: How are your kids? Molly and Andy?

speaker: MOM
text: Not kids anymore. Andy’s going to college on Friday. Can you believe? The Receptionist opens the box. Bonnie tries to look in.

speaker: RECEPTIONIST
text: You sure they won’t miss these?

speaker: MOM
text: Nah, they never get played with. Mom departs and the Receptionist folds up the box flaps.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: You see any kids...?

speaker: REX
text: Where’s she taking us?

speaker: JESSIE
text: Look...!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Wow!

speaker: REX
text: What?! What is it?!!!

speaker: REX
text: Aaah! I can’t see! A bell RINGS. A TEACHER opens the playground door.

speaker: BUTTERFLY ROOM TEACHER
text: Okay, everyone, recess! C’mon! The kids CHEER and flood out on the playground. The Teacher turns off lights, shuts the door behind her.

speaker: HAMM
text: So, now what do we do?

speaker: WOODY
text: We go back to Andy’s! Anyone see an exit?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Exit schmexit! Let’s get played with!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Careful! These toys might be jealous of new arrivals!

speaker: REX
text: I wanna see! It’s my turn! Rex presses in. The Toys react.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Oooff...!!!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Whoa!

speaker: HAMM
text: Hey!

speaker: JACK IN THE BOX
text: New Toys! They all CHEER and burst into smiles. Jessie shakes hands with a ROCK MONSTER toy.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Well, howdy! Glad to meetcha! Buzz extends his hand to a ROBOT toy.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Buzz Lightyear, at your service. Hamm, Slinky and Barbie shake hands with an OCTOPUS toy.

speaker: HAMM
text: Oh boy, oh boy, oh boy! Rex laughs, circled by adoring little dinosaurs. An Insect Man ACTION FIGURE helps Mrs. Potato Head get up.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Oooh, thank you! Oh, may I? Ohhh! He flexes obligingly. She feels his arm, GIGGLES. Mr. Potato Head looks on. He flexes his own arm. It sags. A Crane toy circles the Aliens. They gaze up, rapturous.

speaker: ALIENS
text: The Claw...!!!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Well, hello there! I thought I heard new voices! Welcome to Sunnyside, folks! I’m Lots-o’-Huggin’ Bear! But, please, call me Lotso! Buzz steps up, offers a hand.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Buzz Lightyear. We come in pea... Lotso grabs Buzz, lifts him in a smothering hug.

speaker: LOTSO
text: First thing you gotta know about me... I’m a hugger!! He releases Buzz, looks at the other Toys.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Oh, look at y’all! You been through a lot today, haven’t you?

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Oh, it’s been horrible!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Well, you’re safe now. We’re all

speaker: REX
text: Mr. Lotso...? Do toys here get played with every day?

speaker: LOTSO
text: All day long. Five days a week.

speaker: JESSIE
text: But what happens when the kids grow up? Lotso steps to a wall of day-care class photos.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Yeee-hawww..!!!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: It’s a miracle!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: And you wanted us to stay at Andy’s!

speaker: WOODY
text: Because we’re Andy’s toys! Lotso puts an arm around Woody.

speaker: LOTSO
text: So you got donated by this “Andy”, huh? Well, it’s his loss, Sheriff! He can’t hurt you no more.

speaker: WOODY
text: Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa... Lotso cuts him off.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Now let’s get you all settled in. Ken?! Where is that boy? Ken...?! New toys! A Ken doll appears in an upper window of a doll house.

speaker: KEN
text: Far out! Hey, hi, everybody! Down in a jiff, Lotso! He rides down in an elevator and opens the door.

speaker: KEN
text: So. Who’s ready for Ken’s Dream Tour?

speaker: LOTSO
text: Let’s show our new friends where they’ll be stayin’!

speaker: KEN
text: Folks, if you wanna step right this-- He turns, sees Barbie. She looks up, sees him. Sparks fly. MUSIC swells. Destiny calls. They approach.

speaker: KEN
text: Hi! I’m Ken.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Barbie. Have we ever me--...?

speaker: KEN
text: Huh-uh...! I would’ve remembered! Love your leg warmers.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Nice ascot. Lotso breaks the spell.

speaker: LOTSO
text: C’mon, Ken! Recess don’t last forever!

speaker: KEN
text: Right on, Lotso! This way everyone! He extends a gentlemanly arm. Barbie giggles, takes it.

speaker: LOTSO
text: You got a lot to look forward to, folks -- the Little Ones love new toys! He leads them off. Rex, Buzz, and Woody trail behind.

speaker: BUZZ
text: What a nice bear!

speaker: REX
text: And he smells like strawberries! Woody sighs, exasperated. As they walk, Ken addresses the Toys like a tour leader.

speaker: KEN
text: Folks, if I can share, here at Sunnyside, we’ve got, well, just about anything a Toy could ask for. Lotso leads them past shelves of toy supplies.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Spare parts, super glue, and enough fresh batteries to choke a HungryHungry Hippo.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Think you’re gettin’ old? Well, stop your worryin’!

speaker: KEN
text: Our repair spa will keep you stuffed, puffed, and lightly buffed! An Elephant plushie is getting his belly re-stuffed. He SNEEZES. Stuffing flies everywhere.

speaker: KEN
text: And this, well, this is where I live -- Ken’s Dream House. It has a disco, it’s got a dune buggy... And a whole room just for trying on clothes.

speaker: BARBIE
text: You have everything!!!

speaker: KEN
text: Everything except someone to share it with. He looks down, walks off. Barbie sighs, about to faint. Lotso reaches a bathroom door at the end of the room.

speaker: LOTSO
text: You need anything at all, you just come talk to me. Here we are...! Lotso raps the door with his cane. It’s opened by a large baby doll, BIG BABY, with a lazy, drooping eye. Big Baby COOS, peers out at the Toys. They stare up in wonder.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Well, thank you, Big Baby. Why don’t you come meet our new friends? He throws an arm around Big Baby in Toy-solidarity.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Poor Baby! We were thrown out together, me n’ him. Abandoned by the same owner!

speaker: LOTSO
text: But we don’t need owners here at Sunnyside! We own ourselves! We’re masters of our own fate...! We control our own destiny! Mr. Potato Head slips and falls, losing his parts.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Uh, watch out for puddles...

speaker: LOTSO
text: And here’s where you folks’ll be

speaker: JESSIE
text: Look at this place!

speaker: HAMM
text: Holy moly, guacamole!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Jackpot, baby!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Whoa, puppy!

speaker: REX
text: Wow! A TOY TRAIN weaves through the room, blowing its WHISTLE. The Potato Heads look around in wonder.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: It’s so beautiful! Woody is awestruck. Something nudges him. A RINGING.

speaker: WOODY
text: What the...? He looks down. An old Fisher Price Chatter Telephone is bumping into him. Woody kneels down, friendly. Woody Oh, hey, little fella...

speaker: LOTSO
text: How long’s it been since y’all got played with?

speaker: SLINKY
text: It’s been years!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Well, just you wait. In a few minutes that bell’s gonna ring and you’ll get the playtime you’ve been dreaming of.

speaker: REX
text: Play! Real play!!! I can’t wait!!!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Now, if you’ll excuse us, we best be headin’ back. Welcome to Sunnyside, folks! Lotso climbs back into the Tonka Truck. The Toys wave.

speaker: REX
text: Thank you!

speaker: HAMM
text: Thank you there, Buddy Boy!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Take care, Pinky!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Goodbye, Mr. Lotso! Thank you!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Goodbye...!

speaker: BARBIE
text: Will I see you again?

speaker: KEN
text: Oh, I’ll see you tonight. In my dreams. She giggles. They stare. It’s like they could both spontaneously combust. At the bathroom door, Lotso waits.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Ken...! Let’s get a move on! Ken turns to Barbie, takes her hands.

speaker: KEN
text: Barbie, come with me! Live in my Dream House! I know it’s crazy! I

speaker: KEN & BARBIE
text: ...Made for each other! They gasp, thunderstruck. Barbie turns, gazes to the Toys.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Yay! She gives a leg kick. Ken pumps his fist.

speaker: KEN
text: Yessssssss...!!! Lotso calls again.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Ken...!

speaker: KEN
text: Coming, Lotso! Ken leads Barbie to the Truck and they hop in, giddy. Lotso taps his cane and the Truck roars off. Big Baby is

speaker: HAMM
text: Sounds like kids to me...!

speaker: REX
text: Oh, I wanna get played with! Why can’t time go faster?!!!

speaker: JESSIE
text: How many ya reckon are out there?!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Oh, they sound so sweet! Woody looks at them, knowing he’s fighting a losing battle.

speaker: WOODY
text: Look, everyone, it’s nice here, I admit. But we need to go home...! The Toys glance at each other. Jessie steps forward.

speaker: JESSIE
text: We can have a whole new life here, Woody. A chance to make kids happy again.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Why don’t you stay?

speaker: REX
text: Yeah, Woody! Stay with us!

speaker: HAMM
text: Come on, Woodster!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: You’ll get played with...!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Stay here!

speaker: JESSIE
text: You can make a new kid happy!

speaker: WOODY
text: I can’t! No, no! Guys, really, no! The Toys are taken aback. Woody struggles to stay calm.

speaker: WOODY
text: I have a kid. You have a kid -- Andy! And if he wants us at college, or in the attic, well, then our job is to be there for him! Now I’m going home! Anyone wants to join me is welcome! C’mon, Buzz! He heads off. Buzz stays put. Woody turns back.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz...?

speaker: BUZZ
text: Our mission with Andy’s complete, Woody.

speaker: WOODY
text: What...?!

speaker: BUZZ
text: And what’s important now is we stay together.

speaker: WOODY
text: We wouldn’t even be together if it weren’t for Andy! Look under your boot, Buzz! You too, Jessie! Whose name is written there? The Toys stare at the ground. Rex pipes up.

speaker: REX
text: Maybe Andy doesn’t care about us any more?

speaker: WOODY
text: Of course he does! He cares about all of you! He was putting you in

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, fine! Perfect! I can’t believe how selfish you all are. Jessie glares back. No one moves.

speaker: WOODY
text: So this is it? After all we’ve been through? Buzz steps forward, offers a handshake. Woody looks at Buzz. He fixes his hat, turns away. Buzz is stung. Woody walks to the hall door. Bullseye follows.

speaker: WOODY
text: Bullseye, no. You need to stay! He moves on. Bullseye again tries to follow.

speaker: WOODY
text: Bullseye, no! I said stay!

speaker: WOODY
text: I gotta go. The Toys scatter. Woody hides behind the door just as Bonnie’s Mom enters. BONNIE’S MOM Bonnie? You in here? Woody sneaks out the door, into the hall.

speaker: WOODY
text: C’mon, c’mon... ...and veers into a bathroom.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no...!

speaker: JANITOR
text: What the heck? Woody freezes. The Janitor stares at the mirror, Woody in its reflection.

speaker: JANITOR
text: That’s better.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, no! No, no, no...! His hat lands under a kite tangled on the roof top. Woody

speaker: WOODY
text: Reach for the sky! Woody dangles from a branch, trying to free himself. Bonnie approaches, playing hopscotch. Woody sees her, goes limp. She bumps into Woody, looks up. Looks around. She tugs Woody off the branch. His pull-string retracts.

speaker: WOODY
text: You’re my favorite deputy! She smiles. HONK HONK! BONNIE’S MOM Bonnie!

speaker: BONNIE
text: Coming! She shoves Woody in her backpack, zips it up, runs off.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh, great! As Bonnie and her Mom drive off, CRANE DOWN to REVEAL... Woody’s hat, lying on the ground.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Oh, it’s gonna be okay, Bullseye.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody’s going to college with Andy. It’s what he’s always wanted.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: He’s crazy! College is no place for a toy!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Toys are for play time!

speaker: HAMM
text: Speaking of play time...! They’re lining up out there! Hamm, at the window, is spying on the playground.

speaker: BUZZ
text: How many?

speaker: HAMM
text: There must be dozens!

speaker: REX
text: Ohhh...! I can hardly wait!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Places, everyone! The Toys scramble into play position. Buzz notices the Day Care Toys edging away from the door -- ducking, hiding, trembling, diving for cover. The bell RINGS. Kids SHRIEK. Footsteps THUNDER. Rex spreads his arms and runs to the playground door.

speaker: REX
text: At last! I’m gonna get played with!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Uh, Rex...?

speaker: REX
text: Come to Papa! BOOM! The door bursts open, swatting Rex across the room. A horde of squealing, hyped-up TODDLERS enter. The Toys go limp. Buzz closes his helmet. The toddlers descend on the Toys with SHRIEKS of delight. Toys are snatched up by eager, excited hands. A Boy and Girl stretch Slinky until his coil goes haywire. A Boy smashes the Toy Train into a wall. A Girl picks up Buzz, bringing him straight to her mouth. A Girl dips Jessie’s hair in paint and uses her as a brush. A Boy runs across the room, with Bullseye on top of a Corn Popper toy. Bullseye slides off, gets caught in its wheels. Hamm is bathed in glue... Then coated in green glitter. A Girl “rides” Rex, snapping his tail off. The Aliens are squashed as a Boy sits on them. A Boy picks up Mr. Potato Head’s eye, shoves it up his nose. A Girl uses Buzz to hammer a square peg into a round hole.

speaker: WOODY
text: There’s a snake in my boot!

speaker: WOODY
text: I’d like to join your posse, boys, but first I’m gonna sing a little song. Bonnie holds Woody, smiles.

speaker: BONNIE
text: A sheriff..!! Move over, Mr. Pricklepants! We have a guest! She plunks Woody at a small table circled by other toys -- a HEDGEHOG, a UNICORN, and a TRICERATOPS.

speaker: BONNIE
text: You want some coffee? She sets out cups, pretends to pour.

speaker: BONNIE
text: It’s good for you! But don’t drink too much or you’ll hafta... Hafta... She dances from foot to foot.

speaker: BONNIE
text: Be right back...! She runs out the door. Woody comes alive, looks around. The other Toys stay frozen.

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Shhh!

speaker: WOODY
text: Can you tell me where I am?

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Shhhhhh!!!

speaker: UNICORN
text: The guy’s just askin’ a question!

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Well, excuse me, I’m trying to stay in character! He freezes again. The Unicorn, friendly, turns to Woody.

speaker: UNICORN
text: My name’s Buttercup.

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Shhhh!!!!

speaker: TRICERATOPS
text: I’m Trixie!

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Shhhhh!!!!

speaker: TRIXIE
text: Shhhhhh!!!!!

speaker: BOTH
text: Shhhhhhhhhh!!!!!!

speaker: WOODY
text: Guys, hey! I don’t know where I am!

speaker: TRIXIE
text: We’re either in a cafe in Paris, or a coffee shop in New Jersey. I’m pretty sure I just came back from the doctor with life-changing news! Woody is baffled.

speaker: BUTTERCUP
text: We do a lot of improv here. Just stay loose, have fun, you’ll be fine.

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no, no, I... A FLUSH. Woody gets back in his pose. Bonnie runs in.

speaker: BONNIE
text: Who wants lunch? Beep! Boop! Beep! She pushes buttons on a toy microwave oven, opens the door, removes a plastic hamburger, plunks it in front of Woody.

speaker: BONNIE
text: It has a secret ingredient... She lifts the top bun...

speaker: BONNIE
text: ...Jellybeans! Bonnie eats a jellybean, pulls Woody’s string.

speaker: WOODY
text: Somebody’s poisoned the water hole!

speaker: BONNIE
text: Poison?!

speaker: BONNIE
text: Who would do such a mean thing?! She GASPS and becomes a different character.

speaker: BONNIE
text: Hee-hee-hee-hee-hee!! She turns. SMASH ZOOM to a DOLL on the shelf behind her.

speaker: BONNIE
text: The scary witch!! Bonnie picks up the Doll, flies it around the room.

speaker: BONNIE
text: Look out! She’s using her witch powers!

speaker: BONNIE
text: She’ll never find us in here! Bonnie surreptitiously lifts the Doll into view.

speaker: BONNIE
text: What’s wrong...? She turns. Sees the doll, SCREAMS.

speaker: BONNIE
text: She found us! We need a spaceship to get away! She runs off into a closet. The Toys come alive.

speaker: TRIXIE
text: You’re doin’ great!

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Are you classically trained?

speaker: WOODY
text: Look, I just need to know how to get outta here...!

speaker: BUTTERCUP
text: There IS NO WAY OUT!!! Woody is stunned.

speaker: BUTTERCUP
text: Just kidding. Door’s right over there. The Doll gets up, greets Woody.

speaker: DOLL
text: Well, Cowboy, you just jumped right in, didn’t ya? I’m Dolly.

speaker: WOODY
text: ...Uh, Woody. They shake.

speaker: DOLLY
text: “Woody”? Really? You’re gonna stick with that? ‘Cuz now’s your chance to

speaker: WOODY
text: Well, actually, I.... PEA #3 ‘Course he’s not, pea-brain! He don’t even have a hat!

speaker: WOODY
text: I do too have a... My hat?! PEA #3 Told ‘ya!

speaker: BONNIE
text: I found the spaceship!!

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Show time! Woody and the Toys go lifeless as Bonnie runs out of the closet with makeshift shoebox rocket.

speaker: BONNIE
text: Quick! Fasten your seatbelts! Close your tray tables! She stuffs the toys in the box, drops it on a bedsheet.

speaker: BONNIE
text: Hold on, it might get a little bumpy! 3... 2... 1...! BLAST-OFF!! She pulls the sheet taut. The Toys fly into the air.

speaker: BONNIE
text: Yeee-haaaaw!!! You saved us, cowboy! You’re our hero!!!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Oh, I’ve got a kink in my slink. Rex staggers by, tail missing.

speaker: REX
text: My tail...! Where’s my tail?! Buzz sits up, dazed. Hamm pulls his cork. Detritus spills out. He strains.

speaker: HAMM
text: Someone need a hand?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Where’s my nose... Here’s your arm... Honey, the moustache...?

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Here it is... Gimme that, that’s mine...

speaker: BUZZ
text: I don’t recall play time being quite that strenuous. Rex pulls his tail from a peg board.

speaker: REX
text: Andy never played with us like that! Jessie peels a decal off Bullseye’s nose.

speaker: JESSIE
text: We have to make the best of it.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: But these toddlers! They don’t know how to play with us!

speaker: REX
text: They’re too young!

speaker: HAMM
text: They’re sticky!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: We should be in the Butterfly Room! With the big kids!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: That’s right!

speaker: HAMM
text: You said it!

speaker: BUZZ
text: We’ll get this straightened out -- I’ll go talk to Lotso about moving us to the other room. He clambers up a table, leaps to the bathroom door knob. It doesn’t move.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Blast. Try that one! Jessie leaps to the hallway door latch.

speaker: JESSIE
text: It’s locked! At the playground door, Slinky tests the door knob.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Same here! Buzz drops down, points.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Try the windows. Hamm, on the sill, examines a window lock.

speaker: HAMM
text: Eh, negatory. It’s a FensterSchneckler 380. Finest childproof lock in the world.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: We’re trapped!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Wait! Did anyone notice the transom?

speaker: REX
text: What’s a transom, Buzz?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Oh, great! How do we get up there?! Buzz narrows his eyes, thinking.

speaker: BUZZ
text: All right, everyone! On three! One... Two...

speaker: JESSIE
text: Three!!! They take off, pushing the popper at top speed.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Let go! The Toys drop away, leaving Buzz to jump onto the handle. The popper strikes an upturned table, lofting Buzz in the air. He grabs a string that runs across the room, using it like a zip-line. As he reaches the end, Buzz leaps off, expands his wings and flies towards a display of hanging paper-mache caterpillars, using their legs to swing from one to another. On the ground, Hamm makes signal.

speaker: HAMM
text: Jump! Bullseye and Rex jump off a shelf, catapulting a broom forward. Buzz bounces off the broom, towards the transom.

speaker: REX
text: He did it!!!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Way to go, Buzz! Buzz casts part of his yarn down to the Toys. They run and grab it. Buzz turns to the hallway, stops.

speaker: CHUNK
text: You think they had a fun playtime?

speaker: TWITCH
text: Shhh...!!! They might hear you! Buzz frowns. O.S. GIGGLING. Buzz turns. Down the hall, Ken and Barbie say goodbye at the Butterfly Room door.

speaker: KEN
text: Okay, now you start.

speaker: KEN
text: ...love...

speaker: BARBIE
text: ...you.

speaker: KEN
text: See?! That time I said “love”. Okay, now, me first.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Okay, okay, okay....!

speaker: BARBIE
text: ...love...

speaker: KEN
text: ...you! See what I mean? It changes every time!

speaker: BARBIE
text: You are so smart! As the Tough Toys pass, they drag Ken away.

speaker: TWITCH
text: C’mon, Romeo... We’re late.

speaker: BARBIE
text: I’ll wait up for you!

speaker: KEN
text: Kisses...!

speaker: GANG
text: Yeah, all right! Let’s go again! Buzz pushes open the dispenser flap, climbs in. Above him, a pig OINKS loudly. More LAUGHS and GRIPES.

speaker: KEN
text: All right, place yer bets! Any splits? Here we go! The Gang throws batteries, Monopoly money, other items into a pot. Stretch the Octopus pulls the cord on a Farmer Says toy. As the arrow spins, the Gang roots for their bets.

speaker: GANG
text: C’mon, Duckie, Duckie! Big Pig! Big Pig...! Turkey! Gimme the Turkey!! Ken waves his hand over the table.

speaker: KEN
text: All right. No more bets. The spinning arrow stops on “Duck”.

speaker: STRETCH
text: Yes! Yes! Come to Mama! Stretch scoops up the pile of money. The others GROAN.

speaker: KEN
text: Stretch takes the round. The game continues, Ken presiding.

speaker: KEN
text: Okay, minimum bet, five Monopoly. Coyotes wild. Changing two double AA's. Hey, what do you guys think of the new recruits? Any Keepers?

speaker: SPARKS
text: Nah, disposable...!

speaker: STRETCH
text: Landfill!

speaker: KEN
text: Cowgirl...? Dinosaur...?

speaker: TWITCH
text: Toddler fodder! They start placing bets again.

speaker: KEN
text: How ‘bout that Spaceguy? He could be useful. Buzz reacts, listening.

speaker: CHUNK
text: He ain’t the sharpest knife in the... place where they keep the knives.

speaker: SPARKS
text: Neither are you, Chunk. LAUGHS. Twitch teases Ken.

speaker: TWITCH
text: You got a little Keeper yourself, didn’t’cha, Ken?

speaker: KEN
text: Hey! Lay off, Twitch! Barbie’s different!

speaker: STRETCH
text: Mr. Softy over here...!

speaker: CHUNK
text: Whaddaya expect from a girls toy? Ken stands, furious.

speaker: KEN
text: I’m not a girls toy! I’m not! Why do you guys keep saying that?!!! Twitch waves a hand.

speaker: TWITCH
text: All them Toys are disposable. We’ll be lucky if they last us a week! Buzz reacts. He turns to go... And bumps into Big Baby. Big Baby tosses Buzz on the table. The Gang quickly grabs and subdues him. Ken smirks.

speaker: KEN
text: Well, well, looky who we have here.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Stop! Let me go! He struggles. Ken narrows his eyes.

speaker: KEN
text: Take him to “The Library”.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Nooooooo! A sock puppet is pulled over Buzz’s head.

speaker: WOODY
text: 1225 Sycamore!

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Woody...! What’re you doing? Woody turns. Bonnie’s Toys are watching from the bed.

speaker: WOODY
text: I... I gotta get out of here!

speaker: TRIXIE
text: You’re leaving?!

speaker: BUTTERCUP
text: Didn’t you have fun today?

speaker: WOODY
text: Of course I did! More ‘n I’ve had in years, but... Y’see, I belong to someone else... He holds up his boot, where “ANDY” is written.

speaker: BUTTERCUP
text: Who’s “Yid-nah”?

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: I believe it’s pronounced “Yid-nay”.

speaker: WOODY
text: He’s my Bonnie...! And he’s leaving soon. I gotta get home!

speaker: WOODY
text: Elm Street. 234 Elm. You guys have a map?

speaker: DOLLY
text: We’re on it, Cowboy. Trixie...? Trixie giggles.

speaker: TRIXIE
text: I’ll fire up the computer!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Unhand me, you cowards! I demand to talk to Lotso!

speaker: KEN
text: Zip it, Buck Rogers! You don’t talk to Lotso ‘til we say you can... Abruptly, the door opens. Lotso stands, astonished.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Ken...?! What’s going on here?! Why’s this Toy tied up?

speaker: KEN
text: He... He got out, Lotso!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Got out? Oh, no, no, no! This isn’t how we treat our guests! Lotso approaches Buzz, begins untying him.

speaker: LOTSO
text: F.A.O. my Schwartz...! There you go. I’m so sorry. He frees Buzz. Buzz stands, casting a dark look at Ken.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Lotso, there’s been a mistake.

speaker: LOTSO
text: A mistake...?!!!

speaker: BUZZ
text: The children in the Caterpillar Room are not age-appropriate for me and my friends. We respectfully request a transfer to the Butterfly Room.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Well, request granted!

speaker: KEN
text: But, Lotso...

speaker: LOTSO
text: Hush now, Kenneth! This Toy’s shown initiative! Leadership! Why, I’d say we found ourselves a Keeper! Hear that, everyone?! We got a Keeper!

speaker: LOTSO
text: We’re callin’ you up to the Big Leagues, son! From now on, you’ll have anything you want!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Excellent! I’ll go get my friends. Lotso stops.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Whoa, whoa! Hold on there, Boss! Those Caterpillar kids need someone to play with...!

speaker: BUZZ
text: But my friends don’t belong there!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Oh, none of us do! I agree! Which is

speaker: BUZZ
text: Well, I... I guess that makes sense. Lotso smiles.

speaker: BUZZ
text: But I can’t accept. We’re a family. We stay together. Lotso’s smile fades.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Family man, eh? I understand. Put him back in the “Time Out” chair. Big Baby grabs Buzz and slams him into the toy chair.

speaker: BUZZ
text: What are you...? What?! Unhand me!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Bring in The Bookworm. Ken whistles. A RUSTLING from a shelf above, where rows of files are cluttered.

speaker: BOOKWORM
text: Hold on... Here it is!

speaker: BOOKWORM
text: It was filed under “Lightyear”. He tosses a small booklet down to Lotso. Lotso opens the booklet, flips through it. Buzz looks close, reacts -- it’s a Buzz Lightyear Instruction Manual.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Let’s see here... Accessories... Maintenance... Oh, here we go! “Remove screws to access battery compartment...” Big Baby pushes Buzz down, holding him while Sparks opens Buzz’s battery compartment. Screws drop to the floor.

speaker: BUZZ
text: What are you doing?! Let go of me!

speaker: LOTSO
text: “To return your Buzz Lightyear Action Figure to its original factory settings, slide the switch from PLAY to DEMO...”

speaker: BUZZ
text: Stop! No...! No...!!! NOOOOO!!!

speaker: JESSIE
text: What was that?

speaker: HAMM
text: Sounds like it came from the hall!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: I’ll see what it was! She marches to the door and plucks out her remaining eye. She holds it under the door, sweeping it back and forth.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Whaddaya see? Anything...?

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Nah, just a dark hallway and... Wait, wait...! I see Andy! The other Toys look at each other, disbelieving.

speaker: JESSIE
text: What?!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: That’s impossible...!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: No, I really see him! In his room! My other eye! The one I left behind! She concentrates fiercely.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: This is so weird...! He’s packing up... Uh-oh. Oh, here comes Buster. Buster sniffs under the bed, right toward her eye.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Outta the way! Get away! Buster yawns, turns, and walks out of FRAME.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Okay, Andy’s in the hall. He’s looking in the attic. Wait, there’s Mom. Why is he so upset?

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Oh, no! Oh, this is terrible!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: He’s looking for us! Andy’s looking for us!

speaker: JESSIE
text: He’s looking for us?!

speaker: REX
text: So, Andy does want us! I knew it! I just knew it!!! Rex picks up an Alien, does a happy dance.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: I think he did mean to put us in the attic!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Well, then Woody was telling the truth!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Holy cow!

speaker: HAMM
text: And you didn’t believe him!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Hey, you didn’t believe him first!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Guys, we gotta... We gotta go home!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Lotso...!

speaker: LOTSO
text: How’re y’all doin’ this fine evening?

speaker: JESSIE
text: Oh, thank heavens! Jessie rushes to him. The others follow.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Have you seen Buzz?

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: There’s been a mistake! We have to go!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Go?! Why, you just got here! In the nick of time, too! We were runnin’ low on volunteers for the Little Ones! They just love new Toys, now don’t they?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Love?! We’ve been chewed! Kicked! Drooled on!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Just look at my pocketbook! She holds up her chewed purse. Lotso bends down, amused.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Well, here’s the thing, Sweet Potato -- you ain’t leavin’ Sunnyside.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Sweet Potato?! Who do you think you’re talking to? I have over thirty accessories and I deserve more respec-- Abruptly, Lotso yanks her mouth off. Everyone is shocked.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Ahh...! That’s better! Lotso’s Henchmen snicker.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Hey! No one takes my wife’s mouth!!! Except me! Give it back, you furry air freshener! He steps up to retrieve the mouth. Lotso holds it above him. He finally grabs it. Jessie heads for the door.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Whoa, Missy! You’re not going anywhere.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Oh, yeah? And who’s gonna stop us? Jessie almost collides with a blank-faced Buzz, stepping from the shadows. Jessie and the others are thrilled.

speaker: REX
text: Buzz! You’re back!

speaker: REX
text: Buzz...? WHAM!!! Buzz tackles Rex, slamming him to the floor.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Hey! Buzz leaps and kicks, spins the Toys around, and knocks their legs from under them.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Buzz! The Toys fall to the floor, stunned. Buzz stands atop them, salutes.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Prisoners disabled, Commander Lotso!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Buzz? What are you doing...?

speaker: BUZZ
text: Silence, minions of Zurg! You’re in the custody of the Galactic Alliance!

speaker: REX
text: Zurg...?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Galactic Alliance...?

speaker: HAMM
text: Huh-boy...!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Good work, Lightyear. Now lock ‘em up!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Yes, sir!

speaker: STRETCH
text: Where do you think you’re going?! Jessie reaches through the cubby wire to Buzz’s shoulder.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Buzz...?! We’re your friends! He swats her hand away.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Spare me your lies, Temptress! Your Emperor is defeated. And I’m immune to your... Bewitching good looks. He turns, ramrod straight, and walks off. Big Baby lifts Mrs. Potato Head to a cubby. Mr. Potato Head intercedes.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Hey, Mongo! Keep your paws off my wife! Big Baby drops Mrs. Potato Head in the cubby, turns and picks up Mr. Potato Head.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Hey, what are you doing? Let go of me you drooling doofus! Lotso steps in.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Wait! I think this Potato needs to learn himself some manners! Take him to The Box. Big Baby hoists Potato Head up and toddles off.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Where’re you taking me? Put me down, you moron! Bad baby! Bad baby!!! They toddle past Barbie as she enters the room, confused.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Ken...?! What’s going on?!

speaker: KEN
text: Barbie...! I told you to wait in the Dream House! Ken puts an arm around her, leading her out.

speaker: BARBIE
text: What’re you doing to my friends? Barbie looks over her shoulder as Sparks the Robot tosses an Alien into a cubby. Twitch slams it shut.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Hmmph! She slaps Ken’s arm away and turns to join the Toys in solidarity. Ken tries to grab her.

speaker: KEN
text: Wait, Barbie!

speaker: BARBIE
text: Don’t touch me! We’re through! She stalks off. Ken is devastated. Then Barbie turns, walks back to him. He smiles.

speaker: BARBIE
text: And gimme my scarf back! She yanks the ascot off his neck.

speaker: KEN
text: Oww! Barbie is slammed into a cubby. Lotso surveys the room.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Lightyear! Explain our overnight accommodations.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Yes, sir! Buzz strides past the Toys, each trapped in a cubby.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Prisoners sleep in their cells! Any Prisoner caught outside their cell spends the night in The Box!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Roll call at dusk and dawn! Any Prisoner misses roll call spends the night in The Box! ...Big Baby lowers the lid, closing into BLACKNESS.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Prisoners do not speak unless spoken to! Any Prisoner talks back spends the night...

speaker: JESSIE
text: ...In The Box. We get it. Buzz whips around. Lotso puts a calming hand on him.

speaker: LOTSO
text: At ease, soldier! They’re neutralized! But remember: They’ll say anything to make you doubt yourself!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Don’t worry, Commander! Any doubt I had got pounded out of me at the Academy!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Listen up, folks! We got a way of doing things here at Sunnyside! If you start at the bottom, pay your dues... Life here can be a dream come true! But if you break our rules, step outta line, try to check out early? Well... You’re just hurtin’ yourselves. He takes out Woody’s hat, tosses it. It slides across the floor to Jessie’s cubby. The Toys gasp in horror.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Woody...! What’d you do to him?! Lotso sits back in his truck bed, taps his cane.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Y’all get a good night’s rest! You got a full day of play time tomorrow. Lotso chuckles as he and his cronies drive off. Buzz remains behind, standing guard over the “cell block”.

speaker: WOODY
text: Who’s “VelociSTAR237”? Trixie pushes in.

speaker: TRIXIE
text: Oh...! That’s just a dinosaur toy down the street. That’s nothing. Lemme just take care of that! Just a dinosaur...! Woody finishes typing.

speaker: WOODY
text: All right. Sy--ca--more... Okay, “Enter”! Trixie hits the Return. Slowly, a map begins to assemble.

speaker: WOODY
text: Please don’t be far! Please! The map resolves itself. The route to Andy’s house is a

speaker: WOODY
text: Right around the corner...?! It’s right around the corner!!! Ecstatic, he hugs Bonnie’s toys, leaps off the desk, does a happy dance across the floor, strides to the kitchen door.

speaker: WOODY
text: I’m going to college! Look at me, I’m big toy on campus! Hello! Hey! I’ll see you at the Sock Hop!

speaker: DOLLY
text: Okay, Potsie! Woody starts to slip through a pet door.

speaker: DOLLY
text: You came from Sunnyside?!

speaker: TRIXIE
text: But... How’d you escape?!!!

speaker: WOODY
text: It wasn’t easy, I... What do you mean “escape”? Bonnie’s Toys trade glances. Pricklepants steps forward.

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Sunnyside is a place of ruin and despair, ruled by an evil bear who smells of strawberries!

speaker: WOODY
text: Lotso...?!

speaker: BUTTERCUP
text: He may seem plush and huggable on the outside. But inside, he’s a monster!

speaker: WOODY
text: But... How do you know that?

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Chuckles... He’ll tell you!

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: Yeah, I knew Lotso. He was a good toy. A friend. Me and him, we had

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: I was there when Lotso got unwrapped.

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: Daisy loved us all, but Lotso... Lotso was special.

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: They did everything together. You never seen a kid and a toy more in love.

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: One day, we took a drive...

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: Hit a rest stop, had a little play time. Daisy’s Mom waves a sandwich. Daisy puts down the Toys and runs to join her family.

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: But by then, it was too late.

speaker: LOTSO
text: She replaced us. C’mon! He turns to go, but Big Baby and Chuckles stay put.

speaker: YOUNG CHUCKLES
text: No, she only replaced yo--! Lotso turns on Chuckles.

speaker: LOTSO
text: She replaced all of us! Didn’t she?! Chuckles shrinks back, cowed. Big Baby looks at the pendant, turns and begins climbing up towards Daisy’s window. Lotso walks back to Big Baby and yanks him down.

speaker: LOTSO
text: She don’t love you no more! Now come on! He rips the pendant off, throws it away, and stalks off.

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: We were lost. Cast off. Unloved. Unwanted... The truck hits a pothole, knocking them off the bumper. They hit the pavement, tumble into a puddle in front of...

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: Then we found Sunnyside. But Lotso wasn’t my friend anymore... Lotso stands, eyes narrowed. He limps towards the Day Care. Chuckles and Big Baby watch from the puddle. Lightning FLASHES.

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: ...He wasn’t anyone’s friend. He took over Sunnyside, rigged the whole system. He reaches in his pocket, pulls out Big Baby’s pendant.

speaker: WOODY
text: So... How’d you get out?

speaker: CHUCKLES
text: I got broke. Bonnie found me, took me home. Other Toys, they weren’t so lucky. It ain’t right, what Lotso done! New

speaker: WOODY
text: But... My friends are in there!

speaker: BUTTERCUP
text: You can’t go back! It’s too dangerous!

speaker: MR. PRICKLEPANTS
text: Returning now would be suicide!

speaker: DOLLY
text: But what about your... “Andy”?

speaker: TRIXIE
text: Isn’t he leaving tomorrow?

speaker: BUZZ
text: Quiet, musical hog! Knock it off! Hamm stops playing, sighs. Buzz moves off. Bullseye looks at Woody’s hat, whimpers sadly. Jessie pats his muzzle.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Oh, Bullseye... I miss Woody, too. She turns away, bows her head.

speaker: JESSIE
text: But he ain’t ever comin’ back. Jessie lifts her boot, revealing “ANDY” written underneath. Her eyes fill with regret. The bathroom door bursts open. A Tonka truck races in the

speaker: LOTSO
text: Rise and shine, Campers! Buzz snaps to attention, salutes.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Commander Lotso, Sir! All quiet! Nothing to report!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Wait! What you have you done with my husband?!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Big Baby...? Big Baby steps forward and tosses a dazed Mr. Potato Head

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Sweetheart...!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: It was cold...! And dark...! Nothing but sand and a couple of Lincoln Logs...

speaker: HAMM
text: I don’t think those weren’t Lincoln Logs. Lotso addresses the room.

speaker: WOODY
text: Uh... Hello...? The Lifer’s voice is hoarse and grizzled.

speaker: LIFER
text: You shouldn’a come back, Cowboy. They cracked down hard since you left. More guards. More patrols. You and your friends ain’t ever gettin’ outta here now.

speaker: WOODY
text: I made it out once...

speaker: LIFER
text: You got lucky once. Want my advice? Keep your heads down. You’ll survive.

speaker: WOODY
text: Yeah? For how long?

speaker: LIFER
text: I been here years. They’ll never break me. There’s only one way Toys leave this place... The Lifer rolls forward. Through the window, the Janitor --

speaker: LIFER
text: Poor fella. Trash truck comes at dawn. Then it’s off to The Dump... Woody bends down, respectful.

speaker: WOODY
text: I appreciate your concern, Old Timer. But we have a kid waiting for us. Now we’re leaving. If you’d help us

speaker: LIFER
text: Well, if you’re gonna get out... First thing you gotta get through’s the doors.

speaker: WOODY
text: Got it. What else?

speaker: LIFER
text: Lotso has trucks patrolling all night long. Hallway. Lobby. Playground.

speaker: WOODY
text: Yeah, yeah... What about the wall?

speaker: LIFER
text: Eight feet high. Cinderblock. No way through it. You go over or under. Woody frowns.

speaker: WOODY
text: That’s it?! Doesn’t seem so bad.

speaker: LIFER
text: It’s not. Your real problem’s The Monkey.

speaker: LIFER
text: The Monkey’s the Eye in the Sky...

speaker: LIFER
text: ...Classrooms...

speaker: LIFER
text: ...Hallways... He waddles for the front door. ZOOM UP to a security camera at the end of the hall.

speaker: LIFER
text: ...Even the playground.

speaker: LIFER
text: You can unlock doors, sneak past guards, climb the wall... But if you don’t take out that Monkey, you ain’t goin’ nowhere. Y’wanna get outta here? Get ridda that Monkey!

speaker: TEACHER
text: Okay! Recess! She opens the playground door. The Toddlers drop the Toys, rush outside. The Teacher hits the lights, closes the door. Jessie and the Toys sit up, groaning and aching.

speaker: WOODY
text: Pssst...! Pssst...! Hey, guys...! They look over. From a puppet theater, Woody waves.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Woody? Woody!!!

speaker: REX
text: Woody!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Thank goodness! They quickly run and gather around him, rejoicing.

speaker: SLINKY
text: You’re alive!!!

speaker: HAMM
text: Hey, Buddy!

speaker: WOODY
text: ‘Course I’m alive...! Hey, my hat!!! Woody takes his hat from Bullseye, puts it on.

speaker: WOODY
text: Wait. Where’s Buzz?

speaker: REX
text: Lotso did something to him!

speaker: SLINKY
text: He thinks he’s a Space Ranger again!

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh no...

speaker: HAMM
text: Oh yes. “Return of the Astro Nut!”

speaker: JESSIE
text: Oh, Woody, we were wrong to leave Andy. I... I was wrong...

speaker: WOODY
text: No, no. It’s my fault for leaving you guys. From now on, we stick together. The Toys smile, reassured.

speaker: SLINKY
text: But... Andy’s leavin’ for college!

speaker: JESSIE
text: College!!! Hog-tie the mailman!!! We gotta get you home before Andy leaves tomorrow!

speaker: HAMM
text: Tomorrow...? But, that means...

speaker: WOODY
text: It means we’re busting outta here tonight.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: What?! Impossible!

speaker: REX
text: But there’s no way outta here!

speaker: WOODY
text: No, there is one way out. One way... He turns.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, here’s the plan...

speaker: KEN
text: Cowgirl...

speaker: JESSIE
text: Here.

speaker: KEN
text: Horse... Bullseye WHINNIES.

speaker: KEN
text: Piggy bank...

speaker: HAMM
text: Yo.

speaker: KEN
text: Tyrannosaurus...

speaker: REX
text: Here.

speaker: KEN
text: Barbie...

speaker: BARBIE
text: Here...

speaker: KEN
text: Potato Head... Potato Head? Silence. Buzz backs up, looks in the cubby.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Hey! Tuberous Root Man! Wake up! Buzz rattles the bars. An actual potato rolls to the front

speaker: BUZZ
text: Impossible! A NOISE. Ken and Buzz turn. Potato Head is at the window, struggling with the locks.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Hey! Potato Head sees he’s been spotted. He jumps off the sill and sprints to the bathroom door. Buzz and Ken run across the room. Big Baby toddles after them. As they EXIT FRAME we TILT UP to find... Woody, in a hanging light, takes out a pipe cleaner, bends it, uses it to snag the clothing line of kids’ paintings. Potato Head reaches the bathroom, bangs on the door, then turns to face Buzz, Ken, and Big Baby. They surround him.

speaker: KEN
text: Little late for a stroll, eh, Potato Head?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: That’s Mr. Potato Head to you, Smoothie! PAN and ZOOM past the distracted Monkey to another monitor. On it, Slinky slips out of his cubby cell.

speaker: KEN
text: You’re turning out to be quite the trouble-maker, aren’t ya?

speaker: KEN
text: What’d you think you were gonna do? Waltz right outta here? Woody grabs a bag of marbles, grasps the clothesline, jumps.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: And I would’a got away with it too, if it weren’t for you meddling Toys! Woody lowers via the clothesline, drops the bag of marbles, grabs Slinky, and ascends back up to the ceiling.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Ya ascot-wearin’ pink-noser! Mr. Brains-Sold-Separately!!! He kicks Ken. Ken yelps, turns to Big Baby.

speaker: KEN
text: Take him back to The Box! Big Baby grabs Potato Head, lifts him off the ground.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: No! Not The Box! I’m sorry! I didn’t mean it! I like ascots! Really! No... No! Noooooo!!! They disappear through the bathroom door.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, check...

speaker: KEN
text: Good work, Lightyear! Resume your, uh... Space-guy... Thing-y!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Yes, sir, Well-Groomed Man! He salutes, departs. Ken turns to go.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Ken...?! Ken...! Ken stops. Barbie waves to him. Ken looks around, then approaches warily. Barbie is tearful.

speaker: KEN
text: What do you want?

speaker: BARBIE
text: I can’t take it here, Ken! I want to go to the Butterfly Room! With you!

speaker: KEN
text: Yeah, well, you should’a thought of that yesterday.

speaker: BARBIE
text: I was wrong! I want to be with you, Ken! In your Dream House! Take me away from this! Take me away! She breaks down sobbing. Ken is torn. Finally, he gives

speaker: KEN
text: Darn it, Barbie...! He moves closer, speaks low.

speaker: KEN
text: Okay, but, things are complicated around here. You gotta do what I say!

speaker: BARBIE
text: I will, Ken! I promise!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Wait! I’ll do anything...! I’ll change your diapers! Big Baby tosses Potato Head in, lowers the lid.

speaker: WOODY
text: Go... Get... The... Tape!!! Slinky runs to a Scotch tape dispenser, grabs the tape with his teeth, heads back toward Woody. The Monkey turns, sees Slinky charging, tape in his mouth. He SCREECHES. CUT TO BLACK

speaker: KEN
text: And this... Is where the magic happens. FAST PULL BACK to REVEAL the living room of his Dream House. Racks of clothes line the walls. Barbie gasps.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Look at all your clothes!!! I can’t believe you never brought me up here! Barbie flips through the racks. Ken joins her.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Tennis whites! Mission to Mars!

speaker: KEN
text: I know, I know! Check this out -- “Kung-Fu Fighting”! “Campus Hero” with matching sports pennant, huh?!

speaker: BARBIE
text: Flower Power...!!! Oh, Ken...! Ken pivots away, his mood turning to melancholy reflection.

speaker: KEN
text: No one appreciates clothes here, Barbie. No one. Barbie walks up behind him.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Ken... Would you model a few outfits for me? Just a few?

speaker: SLINKY
text: Go get the key! Woody runs to a bulletin board above the desk.

speaker: WOODY
text: Where is it...? Where is it...? Where’s the key? He finds the keys, buried under push-pinned papers.

speaker: WOODY
text: Bingo! Slinky toggles a security camera joystick.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Yodel-Lay-Hee-Hoooooo...!!! A few cubbies down, Hamm and Rex share a look.

speaker: HAMM
text: Hey! Whadda you think you’re doin?! Buzz stops, turns. In the cell, Hamm plugs his cork into his belly.

speaker: REX
text: Make a move, Porky! Hamm jumps Rex. They grapple. Buzz runs over.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Hey! No fighting! Break it up! He pulls the “cell” from the cubby and they tumble out.

speaker: HAMM
text: Take that, Walnut-Brain! No wonder you’re extinct! Jessie and Bullseye steal out of their cubbies while Buzz gets between Hamm and Rex, holding them apart.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Hey, you can’t hit each other! That’s my job!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Yoo-hoo! Buzz looks up. Jessie and Bullseye stand on a bookcase above him, holding an empty, clear plastic toy bin. They leap, slamming the bin over Buzz. Hamm and Rex leap on top of it, pinning it to the floor.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Help! Prison riot! Buzz FIRES his laser in a circle at the side of the bin. He charges at the wall, hits it, and falls over. Jessie turns to Bullseye.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Get the tortilla! Bullseye heads to a locker, pulls out a lunch box. Jessie opens it. Inside is a tortilla. Jessie grabs it, dashes to the door, slides it under. She knocks and runs off.

speaker: KEN
text: Ready?

speaker: BARBIE
text: Ready...! Ken leaps from behind the screen in a Karate Gi and does a series of fighting moves, kicking and punching the air.

speaker: KEN
text: Haiii-Yaaa! Wah! Whaaa-aaa-aaa -- He freezes mid-pose. Barbie isn’t there.

speaker: KEN
text: Uh... Barbie? Barbie leaps out of nowhere, tackling Ken. Ken lands on his chest. Barbie grabs his head, spins it 180 degrees.

speaker: BARBIE
text: No more games, Ken. What did Lotso do to Buzz, and how do we get him back? Ken is secretly thrilled to have Barbie straddling his chest, talking tough. He is defiant.

speaker: KEN
text: You can’t make me talk! You can’t! Barbie glares at him, eyes narrowing.

speaker: KEN
text: ...But I’d like to see you try!!!

speaker: KEN
text: Barbie, those were vintage! It’s okay! Go ahead, rip ‘em! They’re a dime a dozen!

speaker: BARBIE
text: Oooohh! Glitter tux! RIPPPP...! She tosses the shreds at him. Ken groans in torment, but remains defiant.

speaker: KEN
text: Who cares?! Who cares?! Sequins are tacky! Barbie picks up a Nehru jacket. Ken gasps in horror.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Oooohh!! A Nehru jacket!

speaker: KEN
text: Barbie!!! Not the Nehru...!

speaker: KEN
text: The Gruvvy Formal Collection, yes!

speaker: BARBIE
text: What a shame...

speaker: KEN
text: Oh, no! No! No, no, no...!!! Barbie pulls at the seams. A stitch POPS. Ken cracks.

speaker: KEN
text: There’s an instruction manual! Lotso switched Buzz to Demo Mode...! He breaks down, sobbing. Barbie, steely, grabs Ken.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Where’s that manual?

speaker: BOOKWORM
text: I don’t know why this can’t wait til morning, Ken, but... Here ya go! The Figure salutes, turns, walks off. The Bookworm turns away, then hears an odd CLICKING. He turns back, stares.

speaker: SLINKY
text: What’s takin’ so doggone long? A KNOCK. Woody slides the ceiling panel, revealing Barbie in the Space Suit, helmet off.

speaker: WOODY
text: So how do we fix Buzz? Barbie grins, hoists up Buzz’s Instruction Manual.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: What’re you lookin’ at, Feathers? The pigeon pecks him, taking a chunk out of his tortilla.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Hey! Ow! The pigeon pecks again. Potato Head slaps the pigeon. The pigeon grabs his forehead, dragging him down the ledge. Potato Head hits the pigeon with his hat, gives it a kick. The pigeon flies off. Potato Head shakes his fist.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Yeah, fly away, ya coward! The tortilla rips and disintegrates.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Uh-oh... In pieces, he drops off the ledge to the ground.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Well, that’s just great! A section of tortilla props itself up, looks around. It spots the classroom vegetable garden. The eye goes wide.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Help! Prison riot!

speaker: HAMM
text: Give it up. No one can hear you.

speaker: BUZZ
text: What...?

speaker: HAMM
text: I said no one can hear you!

speaker: REX
text: He said, “No one can...!!!”

speaker: HAMM
text: Shhhh...!!! Will you be quiet?! He slaps a hand over Rex’s mouth. A NOISE. They look up. A ceiling tile opens. Woody, Slinky, and Barbie drop in.

speaker: REX
text: Woody! You’re back! Rex and Hamm move to the front of the bin. Buzz runs to

speaker: WOODY
text: Stop him! Don’t let him get out!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Star Command, I’ve been taken hostage by my own prisoners!!! Hamm and Rex tackle Buzz. Hamm, Rex, Woody and Slink keep Buzz pinned down, as Barbie rushes over with the manual.

speaker: WOODY
text: Quick, open his back! There’s a switch! They pull open Buzz’s compartment, revealing the switch. Woody flips it. Buzz struggles.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Unhand me, Zurg scum! The Galactic courts will show you no mercy! Woody flips the switch back and forth.

speaker: WOODY
text: It’s not working! Why’s it not working? Where’s the manual? Hamm flips through at top speed.

speaker: HAMM
text: Here we go! There should be a little hole under the Switch!

speaker: WOODY
text: Little hole. Got it!

speaker: HAMM
text: “To reset your Buzz Lightyear, insert paper clip....”

speaker: WOODY
text: Rex, use your finger!

speaker: REX
text: Oh! Rex sticks a finger in Buzz’s re-set hole.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, now what?

speaker: HAMM
text: All right, let’s see... “Caution: Do not hold button for more than five seconds.” Abruptly, Buzz BEEPS loudly, falls limp, face plants. The others all look at Rex. Rex lifts his finger.

speaker: REX
text: It’s not my fault! Suddenly, Buzz leaps up, knocking the Toys off him. He strides forward, flips his wrist radio.

speaker: HAMM
text: Now what did you do?!

speaker: REX
text: I did what you told me...!

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Estoy rodeado por criaturas extrañas y desconozco sus intenciónes!!!

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: ¿Quién anda ahí? ¿Amigo? O Enemigo?

speaker: WOODY
text: Uh... Amigos! We’re all amigos! Satisfied, Buzz struts forward, greeting them.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Me debo haber estrellado, y se me borró la memoria. He approaches Woody, kisses both cheeks, strides off.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Han visto a mi nave espacial?

speaker: WOODY
text: We gotta switch him back!

speaker: SLINKY
text: How do we do that?

speaker: HAMM
text: I dunno! That part’s in Spanish! Patrol Truck lights pass by under the hall door.

speaker: WOODY
text: We don’t have time for this! C’mon! Woody grabs Buzz, hustles him toward the playground door.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Mi nave. ¿Lo encontraste? !Excelente! They pass the Lifer, watching from the shadows.

speaker: LIFER
text: Good luck, Cowboy.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Here they come! Woody, Hamm, Rex, Slinky, and Barbie steal across the playground. Spanish Buzz, trailing behind, does elaborate rear-guard defense poses. Woody has to grab him and pull him along. They duck into the pipe.

speaker: JESSIE
text: What took you so long?

speaker: WOODY
text: Things got complicated. Where’s Potato Head?

speaker: JESSIE
text: We haven’t seen him! Woody turns and peers out on the playground. Buzz, the last to arrive, sees Jessie. She turns to greet him.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Buzz... Buzz is struck dumb. Time slows. His heart melts. He approaches, drops to his knees, takes Jessie’s hand.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Mi florecita del desierto...! Yo nunca he visto la belleza verdadera hasta esta noche! Jessie is speechless. She turns to the others.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Did you guys fix Buzz?

speaker: HAMM
text: Eh... Sort of.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Jessie, behind you! Someone’s coming! The Toys turn. A tall figure looms. Mr. Cucumber Head

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: You would not believe...! What I’ve been through...! Tonight! Mrs. Potato Head goes to him.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Darling...! Are you okay?

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: I feel fresh! Healthy! It’s terrible!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: You’ve lost weight! And so tall! Bullseye nudges Potato Head’s torso toward him.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Ahhh, you’re a sight for detachable eyes! He plucks his eyes out and plants them on the spud.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, all clear!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Almost there! Jessie darts out, with others close behind. The lights of a Patrol Truck approach.

speaker: WOODY
text: Back up, back up! Woody backs into the shadows with Bullseye and the Aliens. The Truck pulls up and stops. Jessie looks back, sees Woody and the others still hiding. Woody gestures “We’ll go around”. Jessie does a thumbs-up. Woody and the Aliens ride Bullseye across the playground swing set. They stop abruptly. Big Baby is sitting on the last swing, CREAKING back and forth, gazing up at the moon. Bullseye and Woody tip-toe behind Big Baby, approach the wood siding for the swing set area. Bullseye leaps over the siding but the last Alien falls to the ground. SQUEAK. Big Baby swivels his head 180 degrees. Woody, Bullseye, et al lie low behind the siding plank -- in the shadows, amid plastic shovels and buckets. Big Baby dismounts, walks toward their hiding place. Woody looks around desperately. Big Baby reaches the wood siding, looks over. No one’s there. Looks up and down. He walks off. HOLD ON an overturned plastic bucket. Woody and Bullseye peek out from underneath, share a relieved look. Jessie, watching from the bushes, sighs with relief. Abruptly, Spanish Buzz grabs her, yanks her to him. As Jessie stands awkwardly, Spanish Buzz performs a solemn, impassioned courtship dance around her. Finally, Spanish Buzz takes Jessie in his arms.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: ¡Ven conmigo! ¡Te mostraré las maravillas de la galaxia, y juntos lucharemos contra el despiadado Zurg! He plucks a dandelion, offers it to her.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Woody! Thank goodness!

speaker: WOODY
text: C’mon! We’re almost there! He and Jessie leads the Toys off, REVEALING Spanish Buzz -- stunned and heartbroken. He throws down his dandelion.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: El Vaquero...!!! Mad with jealousy, he narrows his eyes and runs after them.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz, c’mere, gimme a lift! Buzz, smoldering, steps forward, dramatically pushes Woody aside. With a lovelorn glance at Jessie, he hits a button.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Buzz Lightyear al rescate! Buzz steps to the chute, jumps up in a series of crazy, acrobatic moves, and grabs the handle, pulling it down.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Abierto...!

speaker: WOODY
text: Way to go, Buzz! C’mon, everyone! The Toys boost each other up onto the trash chute lid.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Is it safe?

speaker: WOODY
text: I guess I’ll find out...

speaker: JESSIE
text: Woody...! You okay?

speaker: WOODY
text: Come on down. But not all at once.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: What’d he say?

speaker: HAMM
text: I think he said, “All at once”.

speaker: WOODY
text: No...! No! No! No! No! Too late. The Toys slide down together.

speaker: TOYS
text: Whoa! Watch out!

speaker: REX
text: Geronimo...!!! They collide with Woody. Woody windmills his arms at the edge of the chute. Jessie grabs him, pulls him to safety.

speaker: WOODY
text: Thanks, Jess. Spanish Buzz looks about, confused and deeply disappointed.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Donde esta mi nave...?!

speaker: WOODY
