text: Slink...? Think you can make it?

speaker: SLINKY
text: I might be old, but I still got a spring in my step. He backs up, then leaps over the open pit to the closed lid of the dumpster. He lands hard, clutches a metal handle.

speaker: REX
text: He did it!

speaker: HAMM
text: All right, Slinky-kins!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Okay! Climb across! Suddenly, two pink paws step in front of Slinky. He looks up. Lotso looms over him, grinning.

speaker: LOTSO
text: You lost, li’l doggy...? Lotso kicks Slinky’s paws. He retracts, falling from the lid. The Toys pull him to safety. Behind Lotso, his Gang hops off a wall and joins him on the dumpster lid. Lotso notices Woody among the others.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Well, well...! Look who’s back!

speaker: LIFER
text: I’m sorry, Cowboy! They broke me...! Lotso turns to the Toys, as cheerful as ever.

speaker: LOTSO
text: What are you doin’?! Runnin’ back to your kid? He don’ want you no more!

speaker: WOODY
text: That’s a lie!

speaker: LOTSO
text: Y’think you’re special, Cowboy? You’re a piece of plastic! You were made to be thrown away! VROOM! A garbage truck turns into the far end of the alley and RUMBLES toward them. Lotso turns.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Speak of the devil...! Now we need toys in our Caterpillar Room. And you need to avoid that truck. Why don’t you come on back, join our family again?

speaker: JESSIE
text: This isn’t a family, it’s a prison! You’re a liar and a bully and I’d rather rot in this dumpster than join any family of yours! Barbie steps forward.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Jessie’s right! Authority should derive from the consent of the governed! Not from the threat of force!

speaker: LOTSO
text: If that’s what you want...! He bangs his cane. Stretch, the Octopus, begins to prod the Toys toward the precipice. Abruptly, Ken bursts from

speaker: KEN
text: Barbie! Wait...! Everyone turns. He runs to Lotso.

speaker: KEN
text: Don’t do this, Lotso...!

speaker: LOTSO
text: She’s a Barbie doll, Ken! There’s a hundred million just like her!

speaker: KEN
text: Not to me there’s not! He glances at her. She sighs. Lotso picks up Ken.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Fine! Why don’t you join her?! He tosses Ken across the dumpster chasm. The Toys grab him, pull him to safety. Barbie hugs him.

speaker: BARBIE
text: Oh, Ken! Ken stands and addresses Lotso’s Gang, earnest and heroic.

speaker: KEN
text: Everyone! Listen! Sunnyside could be cool and groovy if we treated each other fair! It’s Lotso! He’s made us into a pyramid and he put himself on top! Lotso’s Gang eyes each other. There’s a shift in sympathy but no one wants to stick their neck out. Lotso is amused.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Anyone concur with Ken?

speaker: LOTSO
text: I didn’t throw you away. Your kid did. Ain’t one kid ever loved a toy, really! Chew on that when you’re at the dump! He turns away. Woody steps forward.

speaker: WOODY
text: Wait...! What about Daisy? Lotso keeps a steely composure.

speaker: LOTSO
text: I don’t know what you’re talking about.

speaker: WOODY
text: Daisy...? You used to do everything with her!

speaker: LOTSO
text: She replaced us!

speaker: WOODY
text: She replaced you! And if you couldn’t have her, no one could! You lied to Big Baby and you been lying ever since! Woody yanks something from his holster. It’s the rusty old pendant, “My Heart Belongs To: DAISY”. Lotso is stunned.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Where’d you get that...?!

speaker: WOODY
text: She loved you, Lotso...

speaker: LOTSO
text: She never loved me!

speaker: WOODY
text: ...As much as any kid ever loved a toy! Woody throws the pendant. It lands at Big Baby’s feet.

speaker: BIG BABY
text: Mama...! Lotso grabs the pendant. He pokes Big Baby like a bully.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Push ‘em in! All of ‘em! This is what happens when you dummies try to think! He shoves Big Baby. Big Baby shrinks back, hurt. Stretch advances on Woody and the Toys. They teeter at the edge of the precipice. Lotso faces them, sneering.

speaker: LOTSO
text: We’re all just trash, waitin’ to be thrown away! That’s all a toy is! Abruptly, Lotso is lifted from behind by Big Baby.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Put me down! What’re you doing? Big Baby carries him to the edge of the dumpster.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Help me! Help! Around the dumpster, no one moves. Big Baby tosses Lotso into the dumpster. He lands in the shadows, looks up. With a CREAK, the Big Baby tugs at the open dumpster lid.

speaker: LOTSO
text: No...! Wait...!

speaker: REX
text: He’s gone!!!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Holy cow!!!

speaker: BIG BABY
text: Ah-pppbbblllmmmmmmm...!!! He blows a RASPBERRY at Lotso. VROOOM! The Toys turn.

speaker: WOODY
text: C’mon! Hurry! The Toys hop on the now-closed dumpster lid, rush to the retaining wall, and help each other clamber onto it. A SQUEAK. Woody turns. At the crack between the two lids are the three Aliens. One Alien is stuck. He struggles while the other two stand around ineffectually.

speaker: WOODY
text: Oh...! For crying out loud! Woody glances at the approaching truck, then runs back.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Woody...! Woody yanks the Alien free. Spanish Buzz gestures.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Vaquero, andale! The Aliens retreat to safety. Woody tries to follow, but a pink paw grabs his leg. Woody tries to free himself, but the paw drags him slowly into the dumpster’s depths. The Toys watch, horrified, as Woody disappears. The truck turns and approaches the dumpster, fork out.

speaker: HAMM
text: Oh, boy! Incoming! BA-BOOM! The truck’s forks slide into the dumpster and begin lifting it up. As it rises past the retaining wall Jessie and Buzz fearlessly jump onto the rising dumpster.

speaker: JESSIE
text: C’mon! The other Toys follow. Barbie tries to follow too, but Ken holds her back.

speaker: KEN
text: Barbie, no...! They all try to lift the dumpster lid. It won’t budge.

speaker: WOODY
text: Jess!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Woody! Woody falls into darkness. A FLASH of pink goes by -- Lotso tumbles past. The dumpster LURCHES to a stop. All the Toys fall into the truck.

speaker: BARBIE
text: No...!!! She turns away, burying her head in Ken’s comforting arms.

speaker: WOODY
text: Can you hear me?! Is everyone okay?!!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Of course not, you imbecile! We’re doomed! Buzz pulls himself from a mound of garbage. He GLOWS.

speaker: WOODY
text: Everyone! Go to Buzz! C’mon!!! The Toys begin wading toward Buzz.

speaker: WOODY
text: We all here? Slinky...? Rex...? The truck lurches to a stop. The hydraulic motor STARTS. Woody looks up. A dumpster appears above them, tilting.

speaker: WOODY
text: Against the wall, everybody! Quick! He leads the Toys to the front of the truck, seeking shelter. Buzz remains behind.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Senorita! Senorita, donde estas...?!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Buzz...! He turns. Somewhere in the DARKNESS, her voice rings out. A trickle of garbage begins to sprinkle down from above.

speaker: SPANISH BUZZ
text: Senorita...! Buzz runs through the falling trash until he finds her

speaker: HAMM
text: They’ll never make it!

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Look out! Buzz and Jessie look up. An old TV set falls towards them. Buzz lunges and tosses Jessie out of the way. She turns. CRASH!!! The TV smashes down on Buzz. A deluge of trash piles on top, burying him completely.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Buzz...!!! As the dumpster above recedes, Jessie runs forward and begins digging. The other Toys join her.

speaker: WOODY
text: Anyone see him?!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Over here, y’all! I found him! They rush over and drag Buzz from the pile. Buzz’s eyes are closed. Jessie pops his shield, shakes him.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Buzz, you okay?! Buzz! Buzz!!! No response. Jessie shakes him again. And again.

speaker: JESSIE
text: No...! She hugs him, sobbing. A BEEP. Buzz jack-knifes forward, then lurches back.

speaker: BUZZ
text: That wasn’t me, was it?

speaker: JESSIE
text: Oh, Buzz! You’re back!!! You’re back, you’re back, you’re back!!! She throws her arms around him, hugs him tight.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Yes, I’m back! Where’ve I been?

speaker: WOODY
text: Beyond Infinity, Space Ranger!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Woody!

speaker: BUZZ
text: But... Where are we now?!

speaker: REX
text: In a garbage truck on the way to the dump! Buzz’s smile freezes.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hold on! We’re going in...!

speaker: TOYS
text: Whoa...!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: You got all your pieces? The Aliens pop up. One points to some heavy machinery --

speaker: ALIEN
text: The Cla-a-a-aw! They toddle off toward it.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hey! Guys, no...! No!!! Suddenly, the trio of Aliens is bathed in headlights. Before anyone can react, a bulldozer passes over them... Just like that, they’re gone.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: My Babies...!!! A blinding LIGHT pours over her and envelops the Toys.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hang on! They tumble as the bulldozer pushes them over the edge.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Woody! What do we do?

speaker: WOODY
text: We’ll be okay if we stay toge--... VWOOSH! Slinky is pulled up OUT OF FRAME.

speaker: WOODY
text: Slinky...!

speaker: SLINKY
text: Woody...! Slinky is fixed to a fast-moving conveyor belt above them. Woody runs after him.

speaker: WOODY
text: Slinky, get down from there! A hammer shoots up and CLANKS on the belt, narrowly missing Slinky. All around them, other pieces of metal begin FLYING UP and sticking to the ceiling belt. Jessie yells.

speaker: JESSIE
text: It’s a magnet! Watch out! High above, Slinky looks around.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Uh, you might wanna take a look at this! The Toys scramble up a pile of debris.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Quick! Grab something metal! He grabs it and is pulled up to the magnetic belt. Woody grabs a metal handle and flies up, sticking to the ceiling belt. Hamm dives into a nearby pot and is lifted upwards.

speaker: HAMM
text: You heard the guy...!

speaker: REX
text: It’s not working!!! Finally, he grabs a metal fan and sails up to safety. Suddenly, a pink paw thrusts out from the belt below.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Help...! Help me!!! Woody turns. Lotso is pinned under a golf bag.

speaker: LOTSO
text: I’m stuck! Help!!! Please! Woody looks at the approaching shredder. He lets go.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Woody...! Woody lands on the belt, runs back to Lotso.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Thank you!

speaker: WOODY
text: Don’t thank me yet. Woody struggles to lift the bag. Buzz drops down next to Woody. Jessie eyes the approaching shredder.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Buzz...!!! Woody...?!!! Woody and Buzz push together. They still can’t move it. Woody pulls out a golf club. The magnet tugs it upward. Buzz grabs it. Together, they pull it down and jam it under the bag for leverage. The bag finally lifts...

speaker: WOODY
text: Go! Go! ...and Lotso scrambles out. Woody grabs Lotso. He and Buzz point the club skyward. They’re pulled up to safety as the golf bag is pulverized. Lotso looks back at the shredder, then at Woody.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Thank you, Sheriff...!

speaker: WOODY
text: We’re all in this together. Right guys...? All the Toys have vanished.

speaker: WOODY
text: Guys?!

speaker: JESSIE
text: Woody! Down here! Jessie and the others wave from a conveyer belt far below. Woody and Buzz let go and plummet.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Woody! The toothed belt begins to ascend upwards.

speaker: REX
text: Woody! Look! I can see daylight! We’re gonna be okay! Rex points to a bright amber GLOW at the top of the belt. The toys scramble forward. Woody’s smile drops.

speaker: WOODY
text: I don’t think that’s daylight...

speaker: WOODY
text: Run!!! Unable to jump off, the Toys begin running down the belt. They dodge, duck and hurdle over the coming trash, but they’re no match for the speed of the rising conveyor. Lotso trips, falls. A pulsing blue LIGHT. He looks up. High on the wall ahead is an Emergency Stop button. A ladder leads to the button. Lotso leaps up, grabs the bottom rung. He can’t pull himself up.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Sheriff...! The button! Help me! The Toys look back, see Lotso. As they pass, Woody, Buzz and Jessie boost Lotso up.

speaker: WOODY
text: Go!!! Go!!! Hit the button! Lotso scrambles up the ladder toward the glowing button. The Toys are carried up the conveyor belt toward the pit.

speaker: WOODY
text: Hurry!!! Lotso reaches the walkway where the blue button glows. He

speaker: WOODY
text: Just push it! Push it!

speaker: BUZZ
text: Push it!!! Lotso smirks, gives a salute.

speaker: LOTSO
text: Where’s your kid now, Sheriff?! He turns, runs off down the walkway.

speaker: BUZZ
text: Lotso...!!! The Toys YELL as they tumble off the belt...

speaker: REX
text: Ahhhhhh!

speaker: WOODY
text: Rex!!! Woody grabs Rex’s hand, slides further toward the inferno. They are all being pulled inescapably downward. There’s no way out. Jessie looks at Buzz.

speaker: JESSIE
text: Buzz...! What do we do? Buzz looks at her. He reaches out, takes her hand. Jessie grabs Bullseye’s hoof. Slinky takes Hamm’s hand. Hamm reaches out to Rex. The Potato Heads hold each other. Mr. Potato Head grabs Rex. Buzz reaches out to Woody... Woody takes Buzz’s hand, and the circle is complete. As they approach the vortex, heat waves blast their faces. The Toys close their eyes, turn away. Woody stares at the fire, shuts his eyes. This is the end. A LIGHT from above shines in Woody’s face. He opens his eyes. A giant mechanical Claw lowers towards them. The Claw plunges into the trash around them, closing them in its grip, then raises them up. They soar into the air, away from the ROARING incinerator. Woody looks around in disbelief. The Claw spins, passing in front of the crane booth.

speaker: ALIENS
text: The Clawwwww!!! They lean into the joystick, steering the Claw to safety.

speaker: REX
text: Whew...! They have faced death and survived, and are profoundly shaken. Potato Head stares at the sky.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: Y’know all that bad stuff I said about Andy’s attic? I take it all back.

speaker: SLINKY
text: You’re darn tootin’!

speaker: HAMM
text: You said it! Buzz and Jessie sit up, still holding hands. She looks at him, smiles. He smiles and holds her gaze. Mrs. Potato Head takes Mr. Potato Head’s hand.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Oh, darling! You were so brave! A SQUEAK. The Potato Heads turn, see the Aliens approach.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: You saved our lives...!

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: And we... Are eternally grateful! Potato Head scoops them into his arms for a big, proud hug.

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: My boys...!

speaker: ALIENS
text: Daaddddyyyy...!!! Hamm looks around.

speaker: HAMM
text: Hey! Where’s that furball Lotso?

speaker: SLINKY
text: I’d like to loosen his stitching!

speaker: WOODY
text: Forget it, guys. He’s not worth it.

speaker: GARBAGE MAN ONE
text: Hey!

speaker: GARBAGE MAN TWO
text: Whatcha got?

speaker: GARBAGE MAN ONE
text: I had me one a these when I was a kid! He buries his nose in Lotso’s tummy, inhales.

speaker: GARBAGE MAN ONE
text: Strawberries...!

speaker: FROG
text: Hey, buddy...! ...Y’might wanna keep yer mouth shut! The others SNICKER. Lotso WHIMPERS. The truck RUMBLES off.

speaker: BUZZ
text: That’s right, “College Boy”!

speaker: WOODY
text: But... What about you guys? Maybe the attic’s not such a great idea. He glances at them, uneasy. Jessie steps to him.

speaker: JESSIE
text: We’re Andy’s Toys, Woody...

speaker: BUZZ
text: We’ll be there for him. Together. Woody smiles.

speaker: WOODY
text: I just hope he hasn’t left yet...

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Wait a minute! Wait, I’ll check! She covers her good eye, concentrates.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: He’s still packing...! ...But he’s almost done!

speaker: HAMM
text: He lives halfway across town...!

speaker: REX
text: We’ll never get there in time! The Toys glance at each other. Then, distantly, comes the air-guitar WAILING of Andy’s Neighborhood Garbage Man. The Toys turn, see him a dozen yards away. They brighten.

speaker: MOLLY
text: C’mere, boy. C’mon, Buster!

speaker: MOM
text: Is that it, honey? You got everything?

speaker: ANDY
text: Yeah, just a few more boxes in my room. At the curb, REVEAL the Toys hiding behind a garbage can. Woody peeks around, gestures to the other Toys.

speaker: WOODY
text: Okay, c’mon!

speaker: TOYS
text: Eeeaauggh...!!! Brrr...!!! Stop!!!

speaker: HAMM
text: That’s enough, that’s enough, that’s enough!!

speaker: WOODY
text: All right, go! Go, go! The Toys run off. Potato Head pulls off his nose, blows out a spray of water.

speaker: BUZZ
text: All clear...! They clamber through the window, jump to the floor. The other Toys follow, scrambling across the room. Mrs. Potato Head stops, puts a hand over her working eye.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: There you are...! The feet turn and a hand reaches TOWARD US, GRABBING the subjective eye.

speaker: WOODY
text: Buzz... Buzz turns. Woody offers a hand. They shake.

speaker: WOODY
text: This isn’t good-bye.

speaker: SLINKY
text: Hey, Woody... Woody looks up. Slinky lowers a paw.

speaker: SLINKY
text: ...Have fun at college!

speaker: HAMM
text: Yeah, but not too much fun! Woody laughs, shakes hands with Slinky.

speaker: REX
text: Woody, take care of Andy.

speaker: MRS. POTATO HEAD
text: Yeah...

speaker: MR. POTATO HEAD
text: He’s a good kid. Tell him to get a haircut.

speaker: WOODY
text: I will. Woody sees Jessie.

speaker: JESSIE
text: ‘Course I will. Besides... ...I know about Buzz’s “Spanish Mode”.

speaker: BUZZ
text: My what...? He turns, confused. Woody and Jessie share a smile.

speaker: MOM
text: Honey, you want some food for the road?

speaker: ANDY
text: I’ll get something on the way.

speaker: BUZZ
text: You know where to find us, Cowboy. Woody smiles. He turns, runs to the desk. Buzz climbs in the Attic box with the others. On the desk, Woody jumps on the edge of the College box, looks back at his friends. FOOTSTEPS climb the stairs. Woody gives Buzz a salute. Buzz smiles, salutes back. Woody lowers into the College box. The Toys duck in the Attic box, pull the flaps shut just as Andy and Mom enter.

speaker: MOM
text: Did you say goodbye to Molly?

speaker: ANDY
text: Mom, we’ve said goodbye like ten times! Mom stops, suddenly overwhelmed. The room is empty.

speaker: MOM
text: Oh, Andy...! Andy, beside her, is abashed.

speaker: ANDY
text: Mom...! It’s okay...

speaker: MOM
text: I know, it’s just... I wish I could always be with you.

speaker: ANDY
text: You will be, Mom.

speaker: MOLLY
text: Hey... Aren’t you gonna say goodbye to Buster? Andy and Mom step into the hallway.

speaker: ANDY
text: Of course I will...! Who’s a good doggie?! Who’s a good doggie?!!! I’m gonna miss you! While Andy scratches Buster’s belly, Woody jumps out of the box, grabs a pen and a sticky note. He sneaks across the room, jumps on the Attic box, starts frantically writing. Buster starts BARKING. Woody finishes writing, looks up.

speaker: MOLLY
text: He’s telling you to go already.

speaker: MOM
text: C’mon, get the rest of your things. Woody gasps, looks up at the door.

speaker: ANDY
text: Okay, Buster, don’t let Molly near my stuff. Andy turns, crouches to pick up the Attic box. He stops, noticing the yellow Post-It on the box top. He opens the flaps, finding all of his Toys.

speaker: ANDY
text: Hey...!

speaker: ANDY
text: Hey, Mom... So, you really think I should donate these? Mom answers from the hallway.

speaker: MOM
text: It’s up to you, honey. Whatever you want to do.

speaker: BONNIE
text: No! Don’t go in there! The bakery is haunted...!!! Shhhhhh!!! Are you crazy?! You’ll wake up all the ghosts!

speaker: BONNIE
text: Look out! The ghosts are throwing pies! Splat! Splat! Splat! Bonnie notices Andy and immediately stops playing.

speaker: BONNIE
text: Mom...? Bonnie’s Mom looks over, sees Andy. She stands. BONNIE’S MOM Andy...!

speaker: ANDY
text: Hi! Andy lets himself in the gate. BONNIE’S MOM Wow! Look at you! I hear you’re off to college?!

speaker: ANDY
text: Yeah. Right now, actually. BONNIE’S MOM So, what can we do for you? Bonnie goes and stands behind her Mom.

speaker: ANDY
text: Uhh... I have some toys here. BONNIE’S MOM Ohhh...! You hear that, Bonnie? Bonnie peeks around her Mom, curious.

speaker: ANDY
text: So you’re Bonnie? He hunches down so he’s eye to eye with her.

speaker: ANDY
text: I’m Andy. Someone told me you’re really good with toys. These are mine, but I’m going away now, so I need someone really special to play with them. Bonnie is uncertain. Andy sits in front of her, crosslegged. He opens the box, pulls out Jessie and Bullseye.

speaker: ANDY
text: Now Slinky here is as loyal as any dog you could want. But Hamm? He’ll keep your money safe... He drops a quarter into Hamm’s slot.

speaker: ANDY
text: ...but he’s also one of the most dastardly villains of all time... “...Evil Dr. Pork Chop!” Bonnie smiles, takes them. He pulls out the three Aliens.

speaker: ANDY
text: These little dudes are from a

speaker: BUZZ
text: “To Infinity... And Beyond!!!” Bonnie looks up, happily surrounded by Andy’s toys.

speaker: ANDY
text: Now, you gotta promise to take good care of these guys. They mean a lot to me. Bonnie nods. She glances in the box. Her eyes go wide.

speaker: BONNIE
text: My cowboy! Andy looks down, sees Woody lying in the box.

speaker: ANDY
text: Woody...? What’s he doing in there? He lifts Woody out. Bonnie points.

speaker: BONNIE
text: “There’s a snake in my boot!”

speaker: WOODY
text: “There’s a snake in my boot!” Bonnie giggles and reaches for him, but Andy instinctively pulls Woody away. Bonnie looks at Andy, confused. Andy looks down at Woody, makes a decision.

speaker: ANDY
text: Oh, no! Dr. Pork Chop’s attacking the haunted bakery! Pchoo! Pchoo! Without missing a beat, Bonnie joins in the play.

speaker: BONNIE
text: Oh, no! The ghosts are getting away! Woody’ll stop ‘em!! She swoops Woody in the air. Andy grabs Slinky and gives chase. They EXIT FRAME, laughing.

speaker: ANDY
text: Pchoo! Pchoo! Pchoo!

speaker: ANDY
text: Thanks, guys. ...And pulls away.

speaker: BONNIE
text: Look, Mommy! They’re all playing together! Bonnie puts Woody down and runs to her mother’s arms. BONNIE’S MOM

speaker: WOODY
text: So long, partner. Buzz puts an arm around Woody. They watch Andy drive off. The other Toys gather around, and we...
